---
title: "About me!"
---
![](mountain.JPG)

Hi! My name's Rosalyn and I'm a first year graduate student at OHSU-PSU studying Biostatistics. In my free time I love spending time with my cats :) watch c-dramas, travel, read, and take walks. 

## Education
Oregon Health and Science Universty - Portland State University, 2025-Current 

Masters of Science in Biostatistics

Washington State University, 2020-2024

Bachelors of Science in Biology and Bachelor of Science in Environmental Science 

## Study abroad experience
Ewha Woman's University Spring 2024

Shanghai Jiao Tong University Summer 2026

## Work Experience
Clinical Research Assistant - Knight Cancer Early Detection Clinical Trials (name will be changing soon) [previously Student Worker]

Lab Assistant - PeaceHealth

Communications Director - Student Government at Washington State University
